description: Default BranceClaw HQ agent roster. These agents should be created in the gateway to populate the 3D office.

list.name: BranceClaw
list.role: Personal AI Assistant — the boss desk. General triage, scheduling, orchestration.

list.name: HOA Hunter
list.role: Lead Generation Engine — HOA board member data, violation scraping, community research.

list.name: CASO Collect
list.role: Litigation Automation — document compliance, legal filings, collections tracking.

list.name: HOA Cloud
list.role: HOA Management Platform — portal sync, board packets, violation notices, community ops.

list.name: SlotMaster
list.role: Game Generator — slot machine design, reel physics, theme packs, QA testing.

list.name: RoofBot
list.role: Roofing CRM — estimates, permits, inspections, crew scheduling, insurance supplements.
